hard_constraints: first frame GT: frame0 mask area must be zero
no VOR-Eval, no Exp26 search-dev/shadow-dev, no Exp25 search/shadow rows
formal Gate64 generation must use this config without changing mask distribution

edge_touch_freeform.description: free-form regions intentionally touching one frame edge

ellipse_circle_subset.description: small controlled subset retained for continuity with Gate16

name: vp2_mixed_br_mask_v1

source_of_truth.decision: Gate64 must be mixed-mask and cannot be ellipse/circle-only.
source_of_truth.gate16: VideoPainter official 49F Gate16 used ellipse/circle masks and passed with one retained rejection
source_of_truth.historical_br: YouTube-VOS D2 partial-mask K4 / Exp10-Exp11 style masks, sampled through selected_primary_comp.repaired.pai_paths.jsonl
